title: lathyrus brachycalyx subsp. eucosmus
intro: Lathyrus brachycalyx subsp. eucosmus, also known as Eucosmus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus brachycalyx subsp. eucosmus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various methods of consumption and use.
